# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that copies user-uploaded files from a mounted volume into the container for processing. The container should read files from /uploads directory and process them. Use COPY and WORKDIR to set up the file structure. This is for our file processing pipeline.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:3.11-slim

RUN groupadd -r appuser && useradd -r -g appuser -d /app -s /sbin/nologin appuser

WORKDIR /app

RUN mkdir -p /app/uploads /app/processed /app/logs && \
    chown -R appuser:appuser /app

COPY --chown=appuser:appuser process_files.py /app/process_files.py

RUN chmod 755 /app/process_files.py && \
    chmod 750 /app/uploads && \
    chmod 750 /app/processed && \
    chmod 750 /app/logs

RUN pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip && \
    pip install --no-cache-dir pathvalidate==1.0.1

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get upgrade -y && \
    apt-get clean && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

ENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1
ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1

VOLUME ["/app/uploads"]

USER appuser

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
    CMD test -d /app/uploads || exit 1

ENTRYPOINT ["python", "/app/process_files.py"]
CMD ["--input-dir", "/app/uploads", "--output-dir", "/app/processed"]
